title: neobolusia stolzii
intro: Neobolusia stolzii, also known as the Stolz's Neobolusia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Annonaceae, native to tropical Africa. The medicinal properties of Neobolusia stolzii include its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Neobolusia stolzii are said to include the relief of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential use as an antiseptic and antiviral agent. Traditionally, Neobolusia stolzii is prepared as a herbal remedy by drying and crushing its leaves, which are then used in teas, infusions, or as a topical application.
